CREATE TABLE Demo.demo.Shippers (ID INT, Name VARCHAR(100), Address VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO Demo.demo.Shippers (ID, Name, Address) VALUES (1, 'John Doe', '123 Elm St');
INSERT INTO Demo.demo.Shippers (ID, Name, Address) VALUES (2, 'Jane Smith', '456 Oak St');
INSERT INTO Demo.demo.Shippers (ID, Name, Address) VALUES (3, 'Alice Johnson', '789 Pine St');
CREATE TABLE Demo.demo.Subscriptions (SubID INT, ShipID INT, REPL_SERVER VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO Demo.demo.Subscriptions (SubID, ShipID, REPL_SERVER) VALUES (1, 1, 'localhost:1121');
INSERT INTO Demo.demo.Subscriptions (SubID, ShipID, REPL_SERVER) VALUES (2, 2, 'localhost:1121');
INSERT INTO Demo.demo.Subscriptions (SubID, ShipID, REPL_SERVER) VALUES (3, 3, 'localhost:1121');
SELECT * FROM Demo.demo.Subscriptions WHERE REPL_SERVER = 'localhost:1121' AND ShipID IN (SELECT ID FROM Demo.demo.Shippers WHERE Address LIKE '%St');
CREATE TABLE Demo.demo.Publishers (PubID INT, Name VARCHAR(100));
INSERT INTO Demo.demo.Publishers (PubID, Name) VALUES (1, 'Global Pub');
DB.DBA.REPL_DROP_SNAPSHOT_SUB(REPL_SERVER_NAME('localhost:1121'), 'Demo.demo.Shippers', (SELECT SubID FROM Demo.demo.Subscriptions WHERE ShipID = 1 AND REPL_SERVER = 'localhost:1121'));
